text.title: シアトルのサッカーの日
text.description: Beginner-friendly Japanese article about a soccer match day in Seattle.

text.title: 駅のコインロッカーを使う
text.description: Beginner-friendly Japanese article about using station coin lockers.

text.title: コンビニで食べ物を買う
text.description: Beginner-friendly Japanese article about buying food at a convenience store.

text.title: ラーメン屋の券売機
text.description: Beginner-friendly Japanese article about using a ramen shop ticket machine.
